positive: A minimalist and stylish depiction of celestial wanderers: a glowing, stylized crescent moon, a geometrically perfect star constellation, and a whimsical, stylized depiction of planets orbiting in a calm cosmic ballet. The style should be modern neo-Art Deco meets kawaii vaporwave, featuring clean lines, bold silhouettes, and high contrast. Use a limited color palette of deep midnight blue, ethereal cyan, soft lavender, and metallic gold accents. The composition must be perfectly centered, ideal for all-over apparel printing, ensuring clear, flat-vector-like details and strong visual punch against a solid background. Studio lighting, vector illustration style, ultra-detailed, perfect symmetry.
negative: artifacts, blur, realistic photo, text, signature, watermark, noise, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, cluttered, ugly, grain, gradient, 3d render
